'''âth-p-y''' ('''kathapay''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:filthy|filthy]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-p-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:filthy|filthy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âth-p-y
|-
! Lemma
| kathapay
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thithapay|thithapay]] || [[word:jithapay|jithapay]] || [[word:shithapay|shithapay]] || [[word:kithapay|kithapay]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuthapay|thuthuthapay]] || [[word:jujuthapay|jujuthapay]] || [[word:shushuthapay|shushuthapay]] || [[word:kukuthapay|kukuthapay]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuthapay|thuthapay]] || [[word:juthapay|juthapay]] || [[word:shuthapay|shuthapay]] || [[word:kuthapay|kuthapay]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuthapay|thuthapay]] || [[word:juthapay|juthapay]] || [[word:shuthapay|shuthapay]] || [[word:kuthapay|kuthapay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thethapay|thethapay]] || [[word:jethapay|jethapay]] || [[word:shethapay|shethapay]] || [[word:kethapay|kethapay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothothapay|thothothapay]] || [[word:jojothapay|jojothapay]] || [[word:shoshothapay|shoshothapay]] || [[word:kokothapay|kokothapay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thothapay|thothapay]] || [[word:jothapay|jothapay]] || [[word:shothapay|shothapay]] || [[word:kothapay|kothapay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thothapay|thothapay]] || [[word:jothapay|jothapay]] || [[word:shothapay|shothapay]] || [[word:kothapay|kothapay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠthapay|thĂŠthapay]] || [[word:jĂŠthapay|jĂŠthapay]] || [[word:shĂŠthapay|shĂŠthapay]] || [[word:kĂŠthapay|kĂŠthapay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathathapay|thathathapay]] || [[word:jajathapay|jajathapay]] || [[word:shashathapay|shashathapay]] || [[word:kakathapay|kakathapay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thathapay|thathapay]] || [[word:jathapay|jathapay]] || [[word:shathapay|shathapay]] || [[word:kathapay|kathapay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thathapay|thathapay]] || [[word:jathapay|jathapay]] || [[word:shathapay|shathapay]] || [[word:kathapay|kathapay]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shathapay|shathapay]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshathapay|goshathapay]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishathapay|gokishathapay]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shathapaynĂŒ|shathapaynĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshathapaynknĂŒ|goshathapaynknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishathapaynĂŒ|gokishathapaynĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shathapayshĂ«|shathapayshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshathapaynkshĂ«|goshathapaynkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishathapayshĂ«|gokishathapayshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathapayro|shathapayro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathapaynkro|goshathapaynkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathapayro|gokishathapayro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shathapaymu|shathapaymu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathapaynkmu|goshathapaynkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathapaymu|gokishathapaymu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shathapaysher|shathapaysher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshathapaynksher|goshathapaynksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishathapaysher|gokishathapaysher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shathapayng|shathapayng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshathapaynkng|goshathapaynkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishathapayng|gokishathapayng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shathapaya|shathapaya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshathapaynkya|goshathapaynkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishathapaya|gokishathapaya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shathapayam|shathapayam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshathapaynkyam|goshathapaynkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishathapayam|gokishathapayam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathapaynĂŒshĂ«|shathapaynĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathapaynknĂŒshĂ«|goshathapaynknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathapaynĂŒshĂ«|gokishathapaynĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathapaynĂŒro|shathapaynĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathapaynknĂŒro|goshathapaynknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathapaynĂŒro|gokishathapaynĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathapaynĂŒmu|shathapaynĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathapaynknĂŒmu|goshathapaynknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathapaynĂŒmu|gokishathapaynĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathapayshĂ«nĂŒ|shathapayshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathapaynkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshathapaynkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathapayshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishathapayshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathapayshĂ«ro|shathapayshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathapaynkshĂ«ro|goshathapaynkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathapayshĂ«ro|gokishathapayshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathapayshĂ«mu|shathapayshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathapaynkshĂ«mu|goshathapaynkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathapayshĂ«mu|gokishathapayshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathapayronĂŒ|shathapayronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathapaynkronĂŒ|goshathapaynkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathapayronĂŒ|gokishathapayronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathapayroshĂ«|shathapayroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathapaynkroshĂ«|goshathapaynkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathapayroshĂ«|gokishathapayroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathapayromu|shathapayromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathapaynkromu|goshathapaynkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathapayromu|gokishathapayromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathapaymunĂŒ|shathapaymunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathapaynkmunĂŒ|goshathapaynkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathapaymunĂŒ|gokishathapaymunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathapaymushĂ«|shathapaymushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathapaynkmushĂ«|goshathapaynkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathapaymushĂ«|gokishathapaymushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathapaymuro|shathapaymuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathapaynkmuro|goshathapaynkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathapaymuro|gokishathapaymuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
